patches_applied.description: Added is_finite($bid) && is_finite($ask) guard in post_ea_market_stream() before writing to snapshot DB. Prevents IEEE 754 INF/NaN values from being stored.
patches_applied.regression_test: wordpress/smc-superfib-sniper/tests/php/test-ea-market-stream.php Test 7: INF bid rejected by is_finite() guard

patches_applied.description: Fixed noisy error_log in post_ea_market_stream() for absent candle field. Tick-only payloads (no candle key) are expected behavior — no longer logged. Only logs when candle key is present but not an array.
patches_applied.change: Changed else branch to elseif (isset($payload['candle'])) with correct log message, added comment explaining absent candle is normal.
patches_applied.regression_test: Covered by Test 5 (Snapshot-only payload) which still passes

tests.lint: 70 pre-existing prettier/whitespace errors (no logic errors, unchanged from prior workflow)
